---
title: "Pay, perks and culture shocks: a toolkit for scientists moving to industry"
author: 
- Nature Editorial
publication: "Nature (2023)"
categories: 
  - mentorship
  - careers
href: https://www.nature.com/articles/d41586-023-01971-5
url_preprint: 
journ: "Nature"
issue: 
page: 
year: 2023
image: ""
pub_number: 
doi: 10.1038/d41586-023-01971-5
---
